title: 软银考虑收购机器人初创公司 Gravis
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. is considering an acquisition of Gravis Robotics AG, people familiar with the matter said, as the Japanese investor targets the artificial intelligence technologies underpinning robotics.（原题：SoftBank Weighs Deal for Robotics Startup Gravis）

title: 机器人初创公司 Genesis 正在洽谈融资 30 亿美元
summary: Robotics startup Genesis AI is in talks with investors to raise around $500 million in a new funding round, according to people familiar with the efforts.（原题：Robotics Startup Genesis in Talks to Raise at $3 Billion Valuation）

summary: Travis Kalanick, the former CEO of Uber, said with ATOMS, he hopes to create physical automation to transform industry. The post Uber co-founder raises $1.7B for new robotics startup ATOMS appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Uber co-founder raises $1.7B for new robotics startup ATOMS）

title: Ropedia 融资 2200 万美元，用于扩展训练机器人的数据收集
summary: Ropdeia's HOMIE is a head-mounted device, equipped with a 360º camera view, that captures first-person data for training robots. The post Ropedia raises $22M to scale data collection for training robots appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Ropedia raises $22M to scale data collection for training robots）

title: Holiday Robotics 为其 FRIDAY 轮式人形机器人筹集了 1.05 亿美元资金

title: AMD推出用于机器人实时控制和统一内存的Kria模块
